content:
Rork  complete  finish  this ent to end now and deploy  now RORK — OWNER FINAL DEPLOYMENT ORDER, 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

I already provided the credentials many times. Stop asking again.

Use the saved secure Environment Variables / Owner Variables:

- GITHUB_TOKEN
- GITHUB_REPO_URL
- RENDER_API_KEY
- RENDER_SERVICE_ID

Do this now:

1. Audit whether each credential is present.
2. Do not print or expose secret values.
3. Show only PRESENT / MISSING and last 4 characters.
4. If a variable is malformed, fix the variable name or format.
5. Test GitHub token access.
6. Test GitHub repo push permission.
7. Test Render API access.
8. Trigger Render deploy.
9. Push all pending commits.
10. Deploy the latest GitHub commit.
11. Wait until Render is live.
12. Verify production commit matches GitHub HEAD.
13. Verify /health.
14. Verify /version.
15. Verify the 28 modules and 32 orchestrator tasks.
16. Replace fake “completed” tasks with real states.
17. Mark VERIFIED only after live production proof.

FINAL REPORT ONLY:

CREDENTIAL_AUDIT:
GITHUB_TOKEN_STATUS:
GITHUB_REPO_STATUS:
RENDER_API_STATUS:
RENDER_SERVICE_STATUS:
TASKS_PUSHED:
TASKS_DEPLOYED:
TASKS_VERIFIED:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
PRODUCTION_COMMIT_MATCH:
FAILED_ENDPOINTS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULE:
Do not ask me for credentials again unless the saved credential returns a real 401/403 or is missing. If it fails, show the exact variable name and exact error only.
